case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS BANK OF BOSTON et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF BOSTON PACIFIC TELESIS GROUP DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF BOSTON. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $633.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF BOSTON PACIFIC TELESIS GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
